title: Bahiopsis parishii
taxonomy: Bahiopsis parishii is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This flowering plant is further classified into the subfamily Asteroideae. More specifically, it is placed within the tribe Heliantheae. The genus Bahiopsis is often associated with the subfamily Asteroideae and tribe Heliantheae. Further classification may be necessary to accurately categorize Bahiopsis parishii.
uses: Bahiopsis parishii is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. Research suggests that extracts from the plant may have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
